news.title:
Mangalore Refinery approved an interim dividend of ₹4/share (40%) for FY25-26.
Dividend paid on 24th March 2026; shares have a ₹10 face value.
news.summary:
Mangalore Refinery approved an interim dividend of ₹4/share (40%) for FY25-26.
Dividend paid on 24th March 2026; shares have a ₹10 face value.

news.title:
MRPL announced a 40% interim dividend for FY 2025-26, disbursed by March 24, 2026.
The dividend applies to fully paid equity shares of ₹10 each as declared on March 3, 2026.
news.summary:
MRPL announced a 40% interim dividend for FY 2025-26, disbursed by March 24, 2026.
The dividend applies to fully paid equity shares of ₹10 each as declared on March 3, 2026.

news.title:
Analysts recommend Buy on L&T at Rs 3,588 and RIL near Rs 1,270-1,300; Hold for Canara Bank, MRPL, Piramal Pharma.
Avoid Shakti Pumps; Tata Motors, Vimta Labs advised as Wait and Watch; HBL Engineering Buy on declines; ITC Sell on rise.
news.summary:
Analysts recommend Buy on L&T at Rs 3,588 and RIL near Rs 1,270-1,300; Hold for Canara Bank, MRPL, Piramal Pharma.
Avoid Shakti Pumps; Tata Motors, Vimta Labs advised as Wait and Watch; HBL Engineering Buy on declines; ITC Sell on rise.

news.title:
India secures 60M barrels of Russian oil for April amid Iran war supply concerns, doubling February's volume.
Refiners like MRPL and Hindustan Mittal return to Russian oil; Venezuela oil purchases hit 8M barrels, highest since 2020.
news.summary:
India secures 60M barrels of Russian oil for April amid Iran war supply concerns, doubling February's volume.
Refiners like MRPL and Hindustan Mittal return to Russian oil; Venezuela oil purchases hit 8M barrels, highest since 2020.

news.title:
ITI Ltd surged 197.4x in volume to 668.36 lakh shares, rising Rs.10.15 to Rs.266.90. MRPL's volume rose 4.9x to 789.03 lakh shares, gaining Rs.12.58.
Pfizer's volume increased 6.1x, rising Rs.1.31 to Rs.4683.50. IDBI Bank's volume rose 5.5x but fell Rs.16.58. Thermax gained Rs.0.88 with a 5x volume surge.
news.summary:
ITI Ltd surged 197.4x in volume to 668.36 lakh shares, rising Rs.10.15 to Rs.266.90. MRPL's volume rose 4.9x to 789.03 lakh shares, gaining Rs.12.58.
Pfizer's volume increased 6.1x, rising Rs.1.31 to Rs.4683.50. IDBI Bank's volume rose 5.5x but fell Rs.16.58. Thermax gained Rs.0.88 with a 5x volume surge.

news.title:
MRPL surged 4.93%, closing at Rs.206.35, outperforming Sensex, which fell 3%.
Stock hit 52-week highs, backed by strong volume and upgraded Mojo Grade.
news.summary:
MRPL surged 4.93%, closing at Rs.206.35, outperforming Sensex, which fell 3%.
Stock hit 52-week highs, backed by strong volume and upgraded Mojo Grade.

news.title:
OMCs consider freezing refinery transfer price to limit losses, impacting standalone refiners like MRPL, CPCL, and HMEL.
Private refiners like Reliance and Nayara may face margin squeeze; retail fuel prices have remained unchanged since April 2022.
news.summary:
OMCs consider freezing refinery transfer price to limit losses, impacting standalone refiners like MRPL, CPCL, and HMEL.
Private refiners like Reliance and Nayara may face margin squeeze; retail fuel prices have remained unchanged since April 2022.

news.title:
Crude oil and refined product prices rise; diesel cracks hit 58, ATF cracks 106.
China halts refined fuel exports; Strait of Hormuz handles key gasoil, ATF trade.
news.summary:
Crude oil and refined product prices rise; diesel cracks hit 58, ATF cracks 106.

news.title:
MRPL denies reports of refinery shutdowns, confirms normal operations.
Company assures sufficient crude oil supply for continued operations.
news.summary:
MRPL denies reports of refinery shutdowns, confirms normal operations.

news.title:
Indian refiners, including Mangalore Refinery and HPCL, buy Russian oil rapidly after US eases curbs.
Millions of barrels in Asian waters address West Asia supply crunch effectively.
news.summary:
Indian refiners, including Mangalore Refinery and HPCL, buy Russian oil rapidly after US eases curbs.

news.title:
MRPL denies force majeure amid Iran conflict; fuel operations remain uninterrupted despite crude flow concerns.
MRPL shares rose 2.7% to ₹196.35; Petronet LNG issued force majeure notices due to Strait of Hormuz security risks.
news.summary:
MRPL denies force majeure amid Iran conflict; fuel operations remain uninterrupted despite crude flow concerns.
MRPL shares rose 2.7% to ₹196.35; Petronet LNG issued force majeure notices due to Strait of Hormuz security risks.

news.title: MRPL clarifies it is continuing fuel exports without declaring force majeure.
news.summary: MRPL clarifies it is continuing fuel exports without declaring force majeure.

news.title: MRPL shuts a crude and secondary units at 300,000 BPD refinery due to crude shortage.
news.summary: MRPL shuts a crude and secondary units at 300,000 BPD refinery due to crude shortage.

news.title:
India gets a 30-day US waiver to buy Russian crude stranded at sea.
This offers temporary relief to refiners amid Middle East supply disruptions.
news.summary:
India gets a 30-day US waiver to buy Russian crude stranded at sea.

news.title: MRPL, Reliance, and Chennai Petro stocks react to China's halt on diesel, gasoline exports.

news.title:

news.title:
MRPL board approves 40% interim dividend for FY 2025-26, record date set as March 11, 2026.
Dividend payment scheduled for April 2, 2026; secretarial auditor appointed for FY 2026-31.
news.summary:

news.title:
MRPL board to meet on March 3, 2026, to consider interim dividend for FY 2025-26.
Trading window for MRPL equity shares closed from Feb 24 to March 5, 2026, per insider trading rules.
news.summary:

news.title:
OMC shares rise as Brent falls 4% to $66 and WTI below $63 on easing US-Iran tensions.
Mangalore Refinery jumps 5%; Chennai Petroleum, HPCL gain 2% amid stable OPEC production plans.
news.summary:
